notes: Acted-as-LLM (Claude Opus 4.7 in-session) for POC + query generation; in D3-main these become API calls.
First POC passed verifier-v1 strictly on the first try (no regen needed).
compile_iters=1 = single compile+run round; no repair was triggered.

Bug pattern: of_node_put() placed AFTER an IS_ERR()-style early-return guard, so the error path leaks the device_node refcount. The query generalises this to any return statement located between the of_*-acquire and the of_node_put() call on the receiver variable.

Verifier verdict shows F5.ret=6: verifier-v1 sums returns across both TUs (seed_slice + poc_for_verifier), and IS_ERR/PTR_ERR inline stubs add bool returns; the verdict row still starts with OK(...) so the strict-pass gate is satisfied.
